caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSSES" printed in gold letters sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark table equipped with a professional microphone on a black boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring the "UNICORN HUSTLE" logo with gold stars. To his right, a blue sign on the wall reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table, there is a black electronic device and a black mug with red and white text that says "BOSS TALK OUT LOUD". Across the sequence, the man is speaking and smiling, shifting his gaze and head position slightly. He begins by looking forward toward the microphone, then tilts his head slightly while continuing to smile, and eventually looks toward his right as he speaks.
